final:
module top_module(
	input [63:0] pc_sinsalto,
	input [63:0] pc_consalto,
	input pcsrc,
	output reg [63:0] nextpc
	);assign nextpc = pcsrc ? pc_consalto : pc_sinsalto;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      nextpc <= pc_sinsalto; if (pcsrc) nextpc <= pc_consalto;
    end
  end

endmodule
